message:
bd-3ejoi: fix lifecycle_init_before_stop test + wake_receiver

Replace complex lifecycle_phases_run_in_order with simpler
lifecycle_init_before_stop. Use run_until_idle() to avoid
exhausting the global step budget. Add Sender::wake_receiver()
so handle.stop() can interrupt a server blocked on recv().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
